subject: fix(ui): replace persistent cell outline with fade-out flash animation
body:
Persistent outline on selected cell obscured frames and design content. Now
uses a 0.6s CSS animation that flashes an indigo outline and fades to fully
transparent. React key includes selection state so the div remounts and the
animation replays on each new selection. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

Tags: ui, canvas, animation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cell-highlighting
Semver: patch
